review_text: Despite its promising probiotic count, this product falls short in effectiveness and quality. My experience using this product has not been very pleasant or successful though I'm not entirely certain what the causes are. Firstly, I started taking this since I heard probiotics are good for the gut and we should ideally be consuming them on a regular basis. Since I'm working on my sleep quality I thought probiotics could generally help improve my wellbeing. I read that consuming a higher dose of probiotics was more effective when starting our hence ordering this 30 billion CFU product. The package size, price and quality were great. But on day 3 or 4 of consuming one capsule a day I started to get a rash around my watch where I've never had rash before. Changing my watch to the other wrist also resulted in flare ups the next day. Though I experienced additional gas my overall digestion was not particularly impacted. But my skin would itch a lot in response to very minor irritation which I had not gotten prior to consuming these probiotics. I'm not sure if the dose is too high for me, or if the particular strains being used are causing histamine reactions, or if my body's baseline inflammation is already high. In short this just didn't work for me and I had to stop consuming it. It's been 5 days and I'm still waiting for the rash and itchiness to go away. Perhaps starting with a much smaller dose or 5 billion CFU and choosing for non-histamine producing strains would have been smarter but I'm not sure my body agrees with this product.
